creator: meritus@innervision.pl
text:
Posting optput of shar `find openx` in /usr/ports/www

Also please note that www/phpadsnew is OBSOLETED and should point to openx

A quick reference:
http://blog.openx.org/02/changes-to-openx-site-and-brand-quick-guide/

How-To-Repeat: Create new port, then obsolete www/phpadsnew (force package name change from phpadsnew to openx)

Thanks
